name: King Slide Works Co., Ltd.
summary: King Slide Works Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures, processes, and sells rail kits for cloud computing servers and data devices, furniture accessories, slides, and molds in Taiwan, China, the United States, and internationally. The company offers kitchen/furniture accessories, including metal and wood drawer systems, under mount slides, ball bearing slides, epoxy coating drawer slides, and hinges; consumer electronics, such as mobile phones; and thin server slide rail/cloud computing devices. It also provides products for special applications, such as home appliances, automotive RVs, office equipment, medical, and others. King Slide Works Co., Ltd. was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Kaohsiung City, Taiwan.
